# Crypto Tracker Ai MCP

> Track cryptocurrency prices, compare assets, and manage portfolios

`crypto-tracker-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install crypto-tracker-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx crypto-tracker-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `track_price` — Get the current price, 24h change, and market cap for a cryptocurrency symbol (e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL).
- `compare_cryptos` — Compare multiple cryptocurrencies side by side. Provide comma-separated symbols (e.g. 'BTC,ETH,SOL').
- `calculate_portfolio` — Calculate total portfolio value from holdings. Provide as 'BTC:0.5,ETH:10,SOL:100' format.
- `get_market_cap` — Get the top cryptocurrencies ranked by market capitalisation. Returns up to top_n results (default 5).

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/crypto-tracker-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/crypto-tracker-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
